description: The catastrophic failure of the Digg v4 launch in August 2010, which triggered a massive migration of users to Reddit. This marks a pivotal moment in the decline of the early web 2.0 aggregator model.

key_events.description: Digg releases 'v4' redesign which removes core user features and prioritizes corporate publisher content.
Community backlash ensues; users begin 'Digg the burial' protest where they post only Reddit links.
Reddit sees a massive influx of traffic, confirming it as the primary beneficiary of the migration.

calibration_notes: Excellent for studying the impact of radical UI changes that alienate core power users.
